title: RobotOffsets Property
description: Used to open a wizard that adjusts the position and orientation offsets of the detected parts in the robot coordinate system.
notes:
The Robot Offsets property can be accessed from the property list of Vision Guide. Click the value field of the Robot Offsets property to display the button. When the button is clicked, Robot Offsets Calibration Wizard is opened.

See Also: RobotOffsets Property

RobotYOffset property

see_also:
